name: wm-night
description: WM_NIGHT - injection harness for the umbra dark-mode library: host WM_NIGHT.exe + injected WM_NIGHThook.dll. Pulls Microsoft Detours for the payload's inline GetSysColor / uxtheme / dui70 hooks, and the umbra static library from the WM_UMBRA vcpkg git registry (see vcpkg-configuration.json).
